features.name: coroutine_call_in_virtual_class_method
features.description: Code should include a virtual class method containing a timing-controlled task or fork-join block that generates coroutine calls
features.snippet: class foo; virtual task bar(); #10; endtask endclass

features.name: dpi_call_in_fork_join_context
features.description: Code should include a DPI call inside a fork-join block within a class method

features.name: uvm_sequencer_task_with_timing
features.description: Code should include a UVM sequencer task with timing control that triggers coroutine generation
